idea-plugin.name: CI/CD Merge Oracle
idea-plugin.description:
CI/CD Merge Oracle

Automated merge conflict resolution with build and test feedback.

When a merge conflict occurs, CI/CD Merge Oracle generates resolution variants using learned heuristic patterns, builds and tests each variant in parallel, and presents results in a live dashboard. The best variant is continuously updated as better resolutions are found.

Features

  • Live streaming dashboard — variants appear as they complete, with compilation and test results. The current best is highlighted automatically.
  • Chunk-level control — inspect each conflict chunk with a side-by-side OURS/BASE/THEIRS preview. Pin individual chunks to a specific resolution (OURS, THEIRS, BASE, EMPTY, or free-form manual text) and the pipeline restarts for the remaining conflicts.
  • Consensus indicator — shows per-chunk pattern agreement among the top-scoring variants, helping you identify which chunks are settled and which need attention.
  • Persistent variant history — every variant ever tested is remembered. Browse, compare, and apply any historical variant at any time.
  • One-click apply — apply the best (or any selected) variant directly to your working tree.

How it works

  1. Open a project with an active merge conflict.
  2. Open the CI/CD Merge Oracle tool window (right panel).
  3. Click Run to start generating and testing resolution variants.
  4. Optionally pin chunks you are confident about to narrow the search.
  5. Click Apply Best to write the best resolution to your working tree.
